channel.title: Scripts on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Scripts on ExitCode0

item.title: Modifying Windows shortcuts is Powershell
item.description: Recursively update Windows shortcut targets in PowerShell using WScript.Shell COM objects. Batch-fix broken .lnk files after moving applications or changing drive letters.

item.title: Powershell - Checking the Language Mode
item.description: Check PowerShell execution language mode on Windows to identify ConstrainedLanguage restrictions. Verify security policy settings before running administrative or automation scripts.

item.title: 'Copy, Paste' With Powershell Sendkeys
item.description: Paste complex strings to UAC prompts with PowerShell SendKeys scripting. Bypass clipboard restrictions in elevated dialogs with automated keystroke injection.
